file: Amended_ Privacy Policy - LeCercle Supporters (Last Updated 03.05.2026).docx .docx
name: LeCercle Supporters

controller.name: International
controller.address: 239 Boulevard Général Jacques 1050 Ixelles, Brussels, Belgium

categories.items: name, surname
e-mail address
involvement in local, national, international and other structures of ELSA, years of activity in ELSA
your selected contribution model, contribution amount, contribution frequency, subscription status and payment-related information necessary to process and manage your support
e.g. messages, inquiries, requests or other information you provide when contacting us in relation to your support of ELSA

customCategories.label: Project interests
customCategories.items: the specific ELSA projects or activities you indicate an interest in

customCategories.label: WhatsApp opt-in
customCategories.items: your request, where given, to receive an invitation link to the WhatsApp chat with ELSA International's Alumni

purposes.text: To register and manage your participation in LeCercle Supporters

To process and manage your contribution, including one-off and recurring payments, subscriptions, cancellations and related administrative matters. Where you select a recurring contribution, the recurring charge is performed by our payment service provider on the basis of the payment mandate you grant during registration
To communicate with you regarding your participation, contribution, requests or inquiries
To send you an invitation link to the WhatsApp chat with ELSA International's Alumni, where you have requested this by ticking the corresponding box on the registration form
To keep records of LeCercle Supporters and their contributions
To identify your ELSA background and interests in ELSA projects and activities
To share relevant information about ELSA, its projects, activities or opportunities connected to LeCercle Supporters
To keep our forms, platforms and systems secure and functioning properly
To inform you about changes to this Privacy Policy, where such changes affect the processing of your personal data
To comply with applicable legal, tax, accounting or regulatory obligations
To establish, exercise or defend legal claims and protect the rights and interests of ELSA

recipients: Online form and registration platforms (including the provider of the registration form used for LeCercle Supporters)
Payment service providers (for processing one-off and recurring contributions)
Messaging platforms (in particular WhatsApp / Meta Platforms Ireland Ltd, where you have requested an invitation link to the WhatsApp chat with ELSA International's Alumni)
Partner organisations with whom we engage in the course of LeCercle Supporters
directSources: When you register directly to be a LeCercle Supporter through our website form (including any payment authorisation provided as part of that registration)
When you submit your contribution through our payment service provider integrated into our registration form
indirectSources: When you are contacting us

purposes.text: To allow your participation in ELSA Delegations
To review your application(s) to the respective ELSA Delegations
To rate your application(s) according to the selection criteria
To inform you about the outcome of your application(s)
To appoint you as a Delegate of ELSA International to ELSA Delegations
To coordinate your participation to the respective ELSA Delegation
To provide information (if applicable) to the Organisers of each Delegation
To provide certificates to participants
To answer your inquiries and provide support
To contact you
To process your health data in order to provide you with proper meals adapted to your food restrictions
To photograph and video record you during ELSA Delegations
To use and publish the above mentioned photographs and videos of you in various media outlets, including but not limited to, websites, social media, and promotional materials

To maintain and update the list of delegates to the respective ELSA Delegation as a Data Base for future reference to your ELSA National Group (if requested by the National Group). (deleted in the end of the term)
To maintain and improve ELSA Delegations
Notify you about changes to our Privacy Policy
Comply with applicable legislation
The legal enforcement of claims and rights

directSources: When you apply to participate in ELSA Delegations through our website form
When you contact us through email
Throughout your participation in ELSA Delegations, regarding your attendance, as well as your inquiries
When you submit the evaluation form for ELSA Delegations
